title: Fortinet Ti
description: The Fortinet Threat Intelligence connector imports IOC data from the Fortinet Threat Intelligence database into OpenCTI. It creates Indicators (URL, Domain Name, IPv4) and their corresponding Observables, linked to a Fortinet organization identity.
short_description: Imports URL, Domain, and IPv4 threat indicators and observables from the Fortinet Threat Intelligence database into OpenCTI.
